text: The rawrr package provides access to proprietary Thermo Fisher Scientific Orbitrap instrument data as a stand-alone R package or serves as a backend for the Bioconductor Spectra package.
source_excerpt: The package provides access to proprietary Thermo Fisher Scientific Orbitrap instrument data as a stand-alone R package or serves as [MsRawFileReaderBackend](https://github.com/cpanse/MsBackendRawFileReader) for the Bioconductor [Spectra](https://bioconductor.org/packages/Spectra/) package.

text: The rawrr package implements S3 objects named rawrrSpectrum and rawrrChromatogram to represent mass spectra and mass chromatograms.
source_excerpt: we decided to implement corresponding objects following `R`'s `S3` OOP system [@newS] named `rawrrSpectrum` and `rawrrChromatogram`.

text: The readSpectrum function returns a rawrrSpectrum object or rawrrSpectrumSet.
source_excerpt: Individual scans or scan collections (sets) can be read by the function `readSpectrum()` which returns a `rawrrSpectrum` object or `rawrrSpectrumSet`.
